name: Corned Beef and Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 1/2 small Head of cabbage, cut into wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients (except cabbage) in the crockpot in the order listed.
2. Cover and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours.
3. Add cabbage wedges to the liquid, pushing them down to moisten.
4. Turn the heat to high and cook for an additional 2 to 3 hours.
